family_summary: Interstate air and missile war in June 2025 between Israel and Iran. This bundle centers the Iran-on-Israel bombardment side as one canonical 12-day episode and overwrites the earlier mistaken six-day split.
notes: Per task instruction, the canonical Iran-on-Israel episode is the full 12-day 13-24 June 2025 bombardment. No six-day subepisode is used.
